title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models from Node or browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library; identical API surface to JS client for chat, generate, embeddings, etc.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat endpoint in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, PDF, RAG, multi-user, Dark/Light themes) installable via Docker.

title: ollama-cli (maccam912/ollama-cli)
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI wrapper around ollama with history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot (saul-jb/ollama-copilot)
summary: GitHub Copilot-like plugin that uses Ollama models for local AI code completions in VS Code.

title: ollama-rag (ggerganov/ollama-rag)
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation example using Ollama + Sentence-Transformers + FAISS.

title: ollama-discord-bot (rizerphe/ollama-discord-bot)
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers users via any Ollama model; supports slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-npm (npm package)
summary: Official npm package providing TypeScript/JavaScript bindings to Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama PyPI package
summary: Official Python package published by Ollama team; identical functionality to the JS client.

title: ollama-rs (andthattoo/ollama-rs)
summary: Rust client crate for Ollama with async/await, streaming, and strong typing.

title: ollama-kotlin (okio-ai/ollama-kotlin)
summary: Kotlin multiplatform client for Ollama; use in Android, JVM, or native targets.

title: ollama-go (jmorganca/ollama-go)
summary: Community-maintained Go client library for Ollama with generate, chat, and embeddings APIs.

title: ollama-haystack (deepset-ai/haystack-ollama)
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama4j (ollama4j/ollama4j)
summary: Java client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-slack-bot (technosophos/ollama-slack-bot)
summary: Lightweight Slack bot that leverages Ollama for on-prem AI answers; deploy via Docker.

title: ollama-helm (rabilrbl/ollama-helm)
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and PVC support.

title: ollama-docker-compose (valiantlynx/ollama-docker-compose)
summary: Ready-made docker-compose stacks for Ollama plus WebUI, Redis, Postgres, and monitoring.

title: ollama-reddit discussion: ‘Show HN: Ollama – Run LLMs locally with one command’
summary: Active Reddit thread discussing new Ollama releases, model performance, and community tips.
